title: CorefItemResultV2
description: One coreference item result returned by Python.

annotations.description: Structured sparse annotations when inference succeeded.

CorefAnnotationV2.description: One per-sentence coreference annotation returned by Python.

sentence_idx.description: Sentence index inside the corresponding document item.

words.description: Per-word chain references parallel to the sentence words.

CorefChainRefV2.description: One structured coreference chain reference returned by Python.

chain_id.description: Chain identifier assigned by the coreference runtime.

is_end.description: Whether the current word ends this mention.

is_start.description: Whether the current word starts this mention.
